scripts.tauri:dev:llamacpp: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh llamacpp && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features llamacpp
scripts.tauri:dev:mlx: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh mlx && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features mlx
scripts.tauri:dev:vllm: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh vllm && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features vllm
scripts.tauri:dev:ollama: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh ollama && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features ollama
scripts.tauri:build:llamacpp: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh llamacpp && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features llamacpp
scripts.tauri:build:mlx: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh mlx && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features mlx
scripts.tauri:build:vllm: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh vllm && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features vllm
scripts.tauri:build:ollama: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh ollama && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features ollama
scripts.tauri:build:cloud: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh none && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features
scripts.test:backend:all-engines: cd backend && cargo test --no-default-features --features llamacpp -- --skip web_search && cargo test --no-default-features --features mlx -- engine && cargo test --no-default-features --features vllm -- engine && cargo test --no-default-features --features ollama -- engine
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:chromium && npm run setup:ai
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:fmt && npm run lint:thinclaw && npm run lint:ts
scripts.ci: npm run lint:all && npm run test:thinclaw
